updates.title: ‘Salary growing but wealth shrinking’, warns CA, says Indians must shift investment mindset to growth instead of savings
updates.summary: A CA has warned that India's middle class may see wealth decline even with salary increases. He states that investment strategies need to shift from savings to growth to counteract rising inflation and living costs.
